mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST_SALES_info ( SHOP_CODE, TABLE_IDX, TOTAL_PRICE, FINAL_PRICE, PAY_METHOD, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, DEL_YN, ATT_1, ATT_2, ATT_3, ATT_4, ATT_5 ) VALUES ( #{shopCode}, #{tableIdx}, #{totalAmount}, IFNULL(#{finalPrice}, #{totalAmount}), IFNULL(#{payMethod}, 'CASH'), #{createUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{createUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'N', #{att1}, #{att2}, #{att3}, #{att4}, #{att5} )

INSERT INTO DTL_SALES_info ( SALE_ID, MENU_IDX, MENU_NAME, UNIT_PRICE, QUANTITY, CREATE_USER, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, ATT_1, ATT_2, ATT_3, ATT_4, ATT_5 ) VALUES
( #{item.orderId}, #{item.menuIdx}, #{item.menuName}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.createUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{item.createUser}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{item.att1}, #{item.att2}, #{item.att3}, #{item.att4}, #{item.att5} )
mapper.select: SELECT M.SALE_ID, M.SHOP_CODE, M.TABLE_IDX, M.TOTAL_PRICE, M.FINAL_PRICE, M.PAY_METHOD, M.CREATE_TIME AS M_CREATE_TIME, M.CREATE_USER AS M_CREATE_USER, M.ATT_1 AS M_ATT1, D.DETAIL_ID, D.MENU_IDX, D.MENU_NAME, D.UNIT_PRICE, D.QUANTITY, D.ATT_1 AS D_ATT1 FROM MST_SALES_info M LEFT JOIN DTL_SALES_info D ON M.SALE_ID = D.SALE_ID WHERE M.SHOP_CODE = #{shopCode} AND M.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY M.CREATE_TIME DESC, D.DETAIL_ID ASC
